title: Cash Relief for Platform Workers and Taxi Drivers
text:
Cash Relief for Platform Workers and Taxi Drivers - SupportGoWhere
Cash Relief for Platform Workers and Taxi Drivers
Share link
$200 cash payout for eligible platform workers and taxi drivers.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
$200 cash payout for eligible platform workers and taxi drivers
Payouts will be disbursed from end-April 2026
Collapse all sections
About this support

$200 cash payout for eligible platform workers and taxi drivers.

Who is this for?

Platform workers who have net earnings from platform work of more than $500/month (excluding employment income) across all platform operators, for each month in the three-month period from Dec 2025 to Feb 2026

All taxi drivers who were in an agreement with a Taxi Operator to hire a taxi throughout the three-month period from Dec 2025 to Feb 2026

How to apply?

No application needed.

Where can I find help?

1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.
Scheme last updated 19 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
